mapper.select: SELECT p.PLACE_ID , p.PLACE_TYPE , p.NAME , p.ADDRESS , p.VIEW_COUNT , p.IMAGE_URL , p.CREATED_AT AS PLACE_CREATED_AT FROM PLACE p WHERE (p.NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY p.VIEW_COUNT DESC

SELECT f.FESTIVAL_ID , TO_CHAR(f.DESCRIPTION) AS DESCRIPTION , f.START_DATE , f.END_DATE , f.STATUS AS FEST_STATUS , p.PLACE_ID , p.PLACE_TYPE , p.NAME , p.ADDRESS , p.VIEW_COUNT , p.IMAGE_URL , p.CREATED_AT AS PLACE_CREATED_AT FROM FESTIVAL f INNER JOIN PLACE p ON f.FESTIVAL_ID = p.PLACE_ID WHERE (p.NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY p.VIEW_COUNT DESC

SELECT p.PLACE_ID AS PLACE_ID , COUNT(rv.REVIEW_ID) AS REVIEW_COUNT , NVL(ROUND(AVG(rv.RATING), 1), 0) AS AVG_RATING FROM PLACE p LEFT JOIN REVIEW rv ON p.PLACE_ID = rv.PLACE_ID AND rv.STATUS = 'DISPLAY' WHERE (p.NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') GROUP BY p.PLACE_ID

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLACE p WHERE (p.NAME LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR p.ADDRESS LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND p.PLACE_TYPE = #{type}

SELECT keyword FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT p.name AS keyword FROM PLACE p WHERE p.name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT p.address AS keyword FROM PLACE p WHERE p.address LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
UNION
SELECT DISTINCT r.category AS keyword FROM RESTAURANT r WHERE r.category LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT history_id, user_id, keyword, created_at AS searchDate FROM ( SELECT h.history_id, h.user_id, h.keyword, h.created_at, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY h.keyword ORDER BY h.created_at DESC) AS rn FROM SEARCH_HISTORY h WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} ) WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SEARCH_HISTORY ( history_id, user_id, keyword, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_SEARCH.NEXTVAL, #{user_id}, #{keyword}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
